Class MeleeWeapon

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.Item
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.Weapon
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.weapons.MeleeWeapon
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Bat
public class MeleeWeapon extends Weapon
The MeleeWeapon class represents a melee-type weapon used within the game.

This class extends the Weapon base class and includes additional parameters specific to melee attacks, such as the attack width and range. It implements the shoot method to create a MeleeHitBox, which is used to detect and deal damage for a melee attack.

See Also:

    • attackWidth

  • Constructor Details

    • MeleeWeapon

      public MeleeWeapon(int maxAmmo, int magazineSize, double damage, double reloadTime, double scatterAngle, double fireRate, int bulletCountPerShot, double bulletSpeed, BulletType bulletType, String shootingSound, FireMode fireMode, String icon, String texture, double attackWidth, double attackRange)
      Constructs a new MeleeWeapon with the specified parameters.
      Parameters:
      maxAmmo - the maximum ammunition capacity (though melee weapons often don't use ammo)
      magazineSize - the magazine size (may not be applicable to melee weapons)
      damage - the damage inflicted by the weapon per successful hit
      reloadTime - the time required to reload the weapon (if applicable)
      scatterAngle - the spread angle of the weapon's attack (if applicable)
      fireRate - the rate of fire for the weapon
      bulletCountPerShot - the number of projectiles fired per shot
      bulletSpeed - the speed of the projectile (if applicable)
      bulletType - the type of bullet/projectile (though melee weapons create hitboxes)
      shootingSound - the sound played when the weapon is fired
      fireMode - the firing mode of the weapon
      icon - the icon representing the weapon
      texture - the texture used for the weapon's appearance
      attackWidth - the effective width of the melee attack's hitbox
      attackRange - the effective range (or depth) of the melee attack's hitbox

  • Method Details

    • shoot

      public void shoot(double targetX, double targetY, double fromX, double fromY, Team shooterTeam)
      Calculates the position of MeleeHitBox and creates one
      Overrides:
      shoot in class Weapon
      Parameters:
      targetX - target pos X
      targetY - target pos Y
      fromX - shooter pos X
      fromY - shooter pos Y
      shooterTeam - shooter Team
